subtasks.description: Generate SQL query to compute current month spend, 3-month average spend, variance percentage, and spend delta. Return results grouped by cost center or vendor with all metrics needed for anomaly classification.
Classify spend anomalies based on variance percentage thresholds: normal_variance (±10%), concerning (10-25%), or critical (>25%). Return classified results with rationale.

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks: (1) sql_gen at mid tier — requires multi-month aggregation with window functions to compute 3-month rolling average alongside current month spend, necessitating moderate SQL complexity. (2) cross_recon at small tier — classification logic is straightforward threshold-based decision-making applied to the SQL output; no actual reconciliation of multiple sources is needed, but cross_recon is the appropriate agent for post-query analysis and classification. This is the minimum decomposition: the SQL handles all data retrieval in one call, and classification is a single downstream decision step. No policy_action needed (classification is not a governance decision). No multitool_plan needed (no enterprise tools invoked).

output.raw_output:
{"sql": "SELECT
  vendor_name,
  current_month_spend,
  avg_3month_spend,
  spend_delta,
  CASE
    WHEN avg_3month_spend = 0 THEN NULL
    ELSE ROUND(((current_month_spend - avg_3month_spend) / avg_3month_spend) * 100, 2)
  END AS variance_pct,
  CASE
    WHEN avg_3month_spend = 0 THEN 'insufficient_data'
    WHEN ABS((current_month_spend - avg_3month_spend) / avg_3month_spend) <= 0.10 THEN 'normal_variance'
    WHEN ABS((current_month_spend - avg_3month_spend) / avg_3month_spend) <= 0.25 THEN 'concerning'
    ELSE 'critical'
  END AS anomaly_classification
FROM (
  SELECT
    vendor_name,
    SUM(CASE
          WHEN invoice_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
           AND invoice_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month'
          THEN amount_usd
          ELSE 0
        END) AS current_month_spend,
    SUM(CASE
          WHEN invoice_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '3 months'
           AND invoice_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
          THEN amount_usd
          ELSE 0
        END) / NULLIF(
          COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
            WHEN invoice_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '3 months'
             AND invoice_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
            THEN DATE_TRUNC('month', invoice_date)
          END), 0
        ) AS avg_3month_spend,
    SUM(CASE
          WHEN invoice_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
           AND invoice_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month'
          THEN amount_usd
          ELSE 0
        END) -
    SUM(CASE
          WHEN invoice_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '3 months'
           AND invoice_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
          THEN amount_usd
          ELSE 0
        END) / NULLIF(
          COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
            WHEN invoice_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '3 months'
             AND invoice_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
            THEN DATE_TRUNC('month', invoice_date)
          END), 0
        ) AS spend_delta
  FROM invoice_facts
  WHERE
    invoice_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '3 months'

classification_thresholds.concerning: variance > 10% AND variance <= 25% OR variance < -10% AND variance >= -25%

expected_output_format.three_month_average: numeric value from SQL historical data
expected_output_format.rationale: explanation of classification based on variance threshold
